title: space_set member patch uses dense nested if/else — extract helper
description: In jmap.rs space_set, member operations use path.strip_prefix('members/') then nested if/else for null vs non-null value, then another nested branch for role handling. The logic is correct but reading the control flow requires tracking three nesting levels. Suggested rewrite: extract fn handle_space_member_patch(store, space_id, member_id, value: Option<&JsonValue>) -> Result<()> and call it from the top-level patch loop. This mirrors the existing pattern for other patch handlers and makes the intent readable at a glance.
close_reason: extracted apply_member_patch helper; space_set member loop is now two lines
